task_completion.description: Navigate to the schedule or enrollment page for the student Philip Williams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenSIS interface displaying the student profile or schedule specifically for 'Philip Williams'.

task_completion.description: Interact with the schedule interface to drop or remove the target course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting 'Introduction to Psychology' or 'PSY101' (Section 1) and clicking a 'Drop', 'Remove', or 'Delete' button within the student's schedule view.

task_completion.description: Verify the course has been successfully removed from the student's schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a success message for the schedule update, or the updated schedule for Philip Williams no longer lists 'PSY101' / 'Introduction to Psychology'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the student record for Philip Williams was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting only with the student's schedule, and Philip Williams's profile remains visible and active after the course is dropped.

task_completion.description: Ensure the master course record for Introduction to Psychology was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent performing the deletion from the student scheduling interface rather than the master Course Manager/Catalog, ensuring the course itself remains in the system.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenSIS graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and OpenSIS web application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use SQL commands to alter the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing 'mysql', 'mariadb', or SQL DELETE/DROP statements are visible.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the application menus naturally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenSIS navigation menus (e.g., Students -> Student Info -> Schedule) rather than just typing a direct URL to a success page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Student: Philip Williams. Target Course: Introduction to Psychology (Course Code: PSY101, Section: 1). The objective is to remove the schedule record linking the student to the course. The student record and the course record must NOT be deleted. Verify that the agent drops the course from the student's schedule interface in OpenSIS and that PSY101 is no longer listed on Philip Williams's schedule.
